data.title: 3D printing industry decline is addressed by FUGO Precision 3D. CEO mentions labor and cost complaints.
data.description: In Gardena, California, on February 16, 2026, Alexander Meseonznik, Co-Founder and CEO of FUGO Precision 3D, commented on the struggles facing the additive manufacturing industry. Meseonznik highlighted ongoing challenges that have led to a decline in the sector, including issues such as excessive labor costs and inefficiencies. The industry has been experiencing a steady decline in recent years, with manufacturers voicing concerns over these persistent issues. Meseonznik stressed the need for solutions to address these problems in order to revitalize the additive manufacturing sector.

data.title: Medicus Healthcare Solutions report highlights shortage of breast imaging radiologists due to rising demand, impacting access nationwide.
data.description: Windham, New Hampshire - On February 16, 2026, the increasing need for breast cancer screening and diagnostics is surpassing the number of breast imaging radiologists available. This situation is leading to challenges in accessing timely services across the country. Consequently, Medicus Healthcare Solutions has introduced a new solution to address this issue.

data.title: Dan Williams promoted to General Manager at Century Fasteners after 34 years with the company. Elmhurst, N.Y. - Feb. 16, 2026.
data.description: With a wealth of 34 years in the fastener industry, Dan Williams has greatly contributed to Century Fasteners Corp. since 1996 in roles such as Account Manager and Branch Manager. The company is based in Elmhurst, N.Y., and this news was shared on Feb. 16, 2026 through PRNewswire.

data.title: Rollins, Inc. will present at Barclays 43rd Annual conference, includes Kenneth Krause, EVP & CFO.
data.description: Atlanta, February 16, 2026 - Rollins, Inc. disclosed today that Kenneth Krause, the Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will be presenting at the Barclays 43rd Annual event. Rollins, Inc., listed on the NYSE as ROL, is a leading worldwide provider of consumer and commercial services. This event marks another step for the Company in engaging with investors and industry peers.
